changes.summary: Scaffolded canonical enrichment layer: UserEnrichmentService (batch via getUsersByIdsForEnrichment), CommunityEnrichmentService (batch via listCommunitiesByIds), CommentEnrichmentService, EnrichmentModule, and barrel index exports.
Replaced N× getUser implementation with deprecated re-export from adapters/enrichment/user-enrichment.service for backward-compatible ApiV1CommonModule wiring.

notes: CommunityEnrichmentService and CommentEnrichmentService remain duplicated at api-v1/common/services until follow-up re-export work units; trpc routers continue importing via api-v1 paths. EnrichmentModule ready for AdaptersModule import in a later phase-2 unit.
